settings.vrail: IONIQ Performance · N°02 — recovery & cellular energy
settings.heading: Hydration. Recovery. Clean energy.
settings.lede: 1,000mg of essential electrolytes, 9× fire-roasted bamboo salt with 70+ trace minerals, nootropics and antioxidants — calibrated for athletes who train hard, recover smart, and don't need a stimulant to feel something.

settings.heading: Most sports drinks are sugar. With food colouring.
settings.copy: The bestselling sports drinks contain more sugar than a can of soda and electrolyte profiles built around taste, not science. IONIQ Performance is what you actually need.

settings.text: Every milligram labelled. No prop blends.

settings.heading: Hydration that shows up in every system.
settings.copy: Sodium, potassium and magnesium in the right ratios don't just hydrate. They drive every electrical, muscular and metabolic system in your body.

settings.title: Blood flow & circulation
settings.body: Sodium and chloride regulate blood volume. Magnesium keeps vessels flexible. Faster oxygen delivery.

settings.title: Brain & focus
settings.body: Cognizin® citicoline, L-tyrosine and Rhodiola at full clinical dose. Sharp focus, no caffeine spike.

settings.title: Muscle & recovery
settings.body: Sodium and potassium control contraction. Magnesium clears calcium after. Cramps drop. Soreness clears.

settings.title: Nervous system
settings.body: Nerves run on electrical signals. Electrolytes are the charge. Less fog, less fatigue, faster reaction.

settings.title: Sleep quality
settings.body: Magnesium regulates GABA. ALCAR supports mitochondrial repair. Deeper, less fragmented sleep.

settings.title: Cellular hydration
settings.body: Hydroxyl ions + sodium-glucose co-transport pull water into cells. Not just thirsty — hydrated.

settings.heading: Pre. Intra. Post. One sachet.
settings.copy: Most stacks need three different products. IONIQ was built to do all three — calibrated to be effective whether you take it 60 minutes before, sip it during, or down it after.

settings.label: Pre · 30–60min before
settings.title: Prime the system
settings.body: Pre-load 750mg of sodium and the nootropic stack so focus is sharp before the first rep.

settings.label: Intra · during session
settings.title: Hold the line
settings.body: Sip throughout to replace what you sweat out. The sodium-potassium ratio matches human sweat.

settings.label: Post · 0–30min after
settings.title: Restore + recover
settings.body: Magnesium for muscle, taurine and ALCAR for mitochondrial repair, hydroxyl ions for antioxidant load.

settings.heading: 14+ ingredients. Every milligram labelled.
settings.copy: No prop blends. If it's in the sachet, it has a clinical reason to be there and the dose is on the label.

settings.heading: Compare the numbers.
settings.copy: Same serving size. Independent lab reports. No hidden carbs.

settings.heading: Athletes who switched saw a measurable edge.
settings.lede: A 14-day study with recreational athletes. IONIQ replaced their normal hydration. Independent lab measured plasma volume, RPE and recovery markers.

settings.text: 23% faster heart-rate recovery in the first 60 seconds post-effort.
Lower perceived exertion on equivalent workloads. Felt easier.
Better-rated sleep on training nights — magnesium + ALCAR effect.

settings.heading: What sports scientists & clinicians say about doing this right.
settings.copy: Hydration and electrolyte science isn't controversial — but the marketing is.

settings.quote: Proper hydration is more than water — it requires sodium, potassium and magnesium in the right ratios. When the electrolyte profile matches what the body actually loses, you see measurable improvements in plasma volume and recovery.
settings.name: Dr. Anya Mehta, PhD

settings.quote: The hidden problem in sports nutrition isn't the absence of electrolytes — it's the dose. Most popular drinks under-dose sodium by 4–6×.
settings.name: Dr. James Chen, MD

settings.quote: Magnesium is the most under-dosed mineral in supplement-land. Pair it with proper sodium and you get a recovery effect most athletes write off as 'getting older.' It isn't.
settings.name: Sarah Park, MS RD

settings.heading: Tested. Verified. Athlete-safe.
settings.copy: Every batch independently tested. No banned substances. No proprietary blends. Lab reports on request.

settings.title: Heavy metal tested
settings.body: Every batch screened against strict international limits for arsenic, lead, cadmium, mercury.

settings.title: Trace mineral analysis
settings.body: ICP-MS verified mineral content on every batch — so the label and the bottle actually match.

settings.title: Informed Sport certified
settings.body: Independently tested for WADA banned substances. Safe for competition at all levels.

settings.title: Clean & pure
settings.body: No fillers. No flow agents. No artificial colours. Nine real ingredients.

settings.title: Practitioner approved
settings.body: Recommended by 400+ sports medicine clinicians, nutritionists and strength coaches.

settings.heading: Stop drinking sugar.
settings.copy: Replace the gels, the bottles, the caffeine and the stack with one sachet. Try it for 60 days — if it doesn't outperform what you're using now, we refund the box.

settings.heading: For the science-curious.
settings.copy: Couldn't find what you're looking for? Email us — we'll send you the lab reports.

settings.question: Can I take IONIQ if I don't train?
settings.answer: Absolutely. IONIQ was designed for daily use. Most members drink one sachet first thing in the morning whether or not they're training.

settings.question: Does it contain caffeine or stimulants?
settings.answer: No. The energy is from mineral replenishment, hydroxyl ions, Cognizin® and L-tyrosine — not stimulants. You can drink it before bed.

settings.question: What is bamboo salt and why does it matter?
settings.answer: Sea salt packed into bamboo stalks, fired at 1,500°C — nine times. Korean tradition. Transforms the mineral structure: pH 12, 70+ trace minerals, hydroxyl ions you can't get from any other salt.

settings.question: How does this compare to LMNT, Liquid IV, Gatorade?
settings.answer: 4–7× the sodium of most sports drinks, plus magnesium and a full nootropic stack. Zero added sugar. We're not in the same category — see the comparison table above.

settings.question: Can I take more than one a day?
settings.answer: Yes. For long sessions, heat exposure or recovery days, up to three sachets is within safe electrolyte ranges.

settings.question: Will it break my fast?
settings.answer: No. Under 10 calories per sachet, zero sugar, zero sweeteners. Won't raise insulin or affect ketosis.
